description: Reviewer verdict v2 — mandatory structured rubric (policy-note item 2). A PASS with empty reasons, or a PASS with any UNMET criterion, is rejected fail-closed by the dispatcher.

criteria.description: One entry per spec acceptance_criterion, in order.

evidence.description: Concrete reference: path, line, or diff/test excerpt.

scope_finding.description: Whether changed paths stayed within approved scope; cite any drift.

regression_finding.description: Any behaviour outside the criteria that the diff could break; 'none observed' is acceptable if justified.

security_findings.description: Injected secrets, unsafe shell, credential access, network use; 'none observed' if justified.
